name: Peanut Butter Rice Krispies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, cook the sweetened condensed milk, peanut butter, light corn syrup, and brown sugar until well mixed and thickened, stirring constantly.
2. Remove from heat and add rice cereal, stirring to coat evenly.
3. Grease an 9 x 9-inch pan and pack the mixture into it.
4. Cool completely.
5. Melt chocolate chips and peanut butter over low heat and spread over the bars.
Makes 36 squares.
